title: Tremor Admin UI Design
content: I designed the admin interface for Tremor's platform — account management, user onboarding, auction setup, and account settings. The focus was on clear form structure, consistent visual feedback, and navigation that doesn't get in the way of repetitive admin work. Note that these are only a few samples of the whole project.

images.alt: Tremor Admin UI Settings Page Layout
images.caption: Add Account Form: The account creation form, divided into Account Information, Account Owner Information, and Owner's Contact Information. Fields use green/red validation feedback inline, with a toggle for account status and radio buttons for primary contact selection.

images.alt: Tremor Admin UI Account Settings Layout
images.caption: Account Settings: Profile overview (read-only with an edit trigger), authorization options (password, 2FA, deactivation), platform preferences (language, time zone, decimal format), and notification toggles — all in one page with color-coded action buttons.

images.alt: Tremor Admin UI Get Started Screen Layout
images.caption: Get Started Screen: The entry point for the auction setup tool, with a brief instructions summary and a prominent Start button. Sidebar navigation gives quick access to Manage Auctions and Execute Auctions.

images.alt: Tremor Admin UI Add User Form Layout
images.caption: Add User Form: User onboarding form with fields for profile info, contact details, and account role. Includes dropdowns, toggles, and a clear primary action button alongside a cancel option.
